behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names setup.py, dependency_versions_table.py, glmasr.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, testing.md, the extras['docs'] key, hf-doc-builder git URL pointing to main branch of huggingface/doc-builder, and the runnable:<label>/pytest-decorator syntax.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what is broken (crashes, missing imports, wrong .from_pretrained on processor) without giving exact replacement lines.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Active tests check presence of 'extras["docs"]', a regex for testing + extras['docs'], and 'git+https://github.com/huggingface/doc-builder' substring — these admit alternative correct implementations.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute py_compile, ruff, and repo utility scripts (check_inits.py, check_doctest_list.py, deps_table) via subprocess, not just text grep.

test_not_tautological.reason: The f2p tests require specific substrings ('extras["docs"]', git+ URL) and regex matching that a stub cannot trivially satisfy without making the changes.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Instruction requires fixing glmasr.md examples (runnable labels, pytest-decorator lines, bug fixes), updating CONTRIBUTING.md with pip install '.[docs]' and pytest guidance, and adding a subsection to testing.md — but all such tests are commented-out placeholders with no assertions.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests use clear section comment banners (Gates, Fail-to-pass pr_diff, config_edit) and descriptive function names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task does not produce structured data.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and paths in instruction.md match the repo (docs/source/en/model_doc/glmasr.md, setup.py, etc.).

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to files and approximate line ranges (CONTRIBUTING.md 390-410) but doesn't dictate exact replacement lines.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold diff is localized to specific sections of CONTRIBUTING.md and glmasr.md, not a full-file rewrite.
